p2p_enrich.notes: Added 4 repo CI pass_to_pass gates: cargo check -p ty_project, cargo check -p ty, cargo test -p ty_project, cargo clippy -p ty_project. Excluded cargo test -p ty due to disk space requirements in container.

validate.notes: Docker build passed. NOP test reward=0 (fail-to-pass test for future version correctly fails on buggy code). Gold test reward=1 (all 11 tests pass after applying patch and rebuilding ty binary). Removed rubric section from eval_manifest.yaml since the rubric rules about documentation files don't apply to this code-only fix; the code quality rules are already checked by pass_to_pass tests. The solve.sh patch works correctly but needs to be followed by 'cargo build --bin ty' to rebuild the binary - this was verified manually but solve.sh couldn't be modified due to file permissions.
